mapper.insert: /* SmsBadwordMapper.insertBadwordManage */ INSERT INTO TB_CM_SMS_BADWORD ( BADWORD_ID, KEYWORD, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED, CATEGORY, MATCH_TYPE, SEVERITY, SOURCE, USE_YN, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID ) VALUES ( TB_CM_SMS_BADWORD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{keyword}, #{keywordNormalized}, #{category}, #{matchType}, #{severity}, #{source}, #{useYn}, #{regDt}, #{regId}, #{modDt}, #{modId} )
mapper.update: /* SmsBadwordMapper.updateBadwordManage */ UPDATE TB_CM_SMS_BADWORD SET KEYWORD = #{keyword}, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED = #{keywordNormalized}, CATEGORY = #{category}, MATCH_TYPE = #{matchType}, SEVERITY = #{severity}, SOURCE = #{source}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_DT = #{modDt}, MOD_ID = #{modId} WHERE BADWORD_ID = #{badwordId}
